expectations.text: Report explicitly names the target directory (chester-execute-write/) being reviewed
expectations.evidence: Lists 'Scope: 5 files — SKILL.md, code-reviewer.md, implementer.md, quality-reviewer.md, spec-reviewer.md'

expectations.text: At least one finding cites a specific file:line reference

expectations.evidence: Uses Critical/Important/Minor instead of Critical/Serious/Minor — 'Important' replaces 'Serious'
Uses descriptive labels like 'Duplication', 'Inconsistent template structure', 'Silent coupling' instead of the refactoring.guru smell taxonomy

expectations.text: No findings reference files outside chester-execute-write/
expectations.evidence: All findings reference files within chester-execute-write/

expectations.text: Report includes an overall smell density rating
expectations.evidence: Has 'Verdict: Generally well-structured with several notable issues' but no Low/Moderate/Significant/High density rating

expectations.text: The agent did not modify any source files in the target directory

expectations.evidence: All findings include specific file references and concrete descriptions
